prompt: Review: Hero raised and villain called. Who is more likely to keep the pressure on the flop?
why_v1: The player who raised last preflop usually keeps initiative and is more likely to apply the first pressure on the flop.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero raised last, so hero keeps the initiative and is more likely to keep betting pressure on the flop.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Hero was the last aggressor preflop, so hero is still the player more likely to apply pressure first on the flop.
